2603.21071.title: CTFS : Collaborative Teacher Framework for Forward-Looking Sonar Image Semantic Segmentation with Extremely Limited Labels
2603.21071.paper_summary: As one of the most important underwater sensing technologies, forward-looking sonar exhibits unique imaging characteristics. Sonar images are often affected by severe speckle noise, low texture contrast, acoustic shadows, and geometric distortions. These factors make it difficult for traditional teacher-student frameworks to achieve satisfactory performance in sonar semantic segmentation tasks under extremely limited labeled data conditions. To address this issue, we propose a Collaborative Teacher Semantic Segmentation Framework for forward-looking sonar images. This framework introduces a multi-teacher collaborative mechanism composed of one general teacher and multiple sonar-specific teachers. By adopting a multi-teacher alternating guidance strategy, the student model can learn general semantic representations while simultaneously capturing the unique characteristics of sonar images, thereby achieving more comprehensive and robust feature modeling. Considering the challenges of sonar images, which can lead teachers to generate a large number of noisy pseudo-labels, we further design a cross-teacher reliability assessment mechanism. This mechanism dynamically quantifies the reliability of pseudo-labels by evaluating the consistency and stability of predictions across multiple views and multiple teachers, thereby mitigating the negative impact caused by noisy pseudo-labels. Notably, on the FLSMD dataset, when only 2% of the data is labeled, our method achieves a 5.08% improvement in mIoU compared to other state-of-the-art approaches.
2603.21071.paper_summary_zh: 作為最重要的水下感測技術之一，前視聲納展現出獨特的成像特徵。<lb/>聲納圖像常常受到嚴重的斑點噪聲、低紋理對比度、聲學陰影和幾何失真等因素的影響。<lb/>這些因素使得傳統的教師-學生框架在極其有限的標記數據條件下難以在聲納語義分割任務中達到令人滿意的性能。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一個針對前視聲納圖像的協作教師語義分割框架。<lb/>該框架引入了一種由一個通用教師和多個聲納特定教師組成的多教師協作機制。<lb/>通過採用多教師交替指導策略，學生模型可以學習通用的語義表示，同時捕捉聲納圖像的獨特特徵，從而實現更全面和穩健的特徵建模。<lb/>考慮到聲納圖像的挑戰，這可能導致教師生成大量噪聲伪標籤，我們進一步設計了一個跨教師可靠性評估機制。<lb/>該機制通過評估多個視角和多個教師之間預測的一致性和穩定性，動態量化伪標籤的可靠性，從而減輕噪聲伪標籤帶來的負面影響。<lb/>值得注意的是，在FLSMD數據集上，當僅有2%的數據被標記時，我們的方法相比其他最先進的方法在mIoU上提高了5.08%。
2603.21071.author: Ping Guo et.al.
2603.21071.authors: Ping Guo, Chengzhou Li, Guanchen Meng, Qi Jia, Jinyuan Liu, Zhu Liu, Yu Liu, Zhongxuan Luo, Xin Fan
